creator: lippebsd@gmail.com
text:
Hi Chris,

I have looked to your patch, its ok, but your port does not compile on
6.x and 7.x, only under 8.x. Follow the logs:

http://regis.goodking.ca/tb/errors/6-lippe/afflib-3.2.5.log
http://regis.goodking.ca/tb/errors/7-lippe/afflib-3.2.5.log
http://regis.goodking.ca/tb/logs/8-lippe/afflib-3.2.5.log

Try to fix it and send me again, thank you! :)

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
